items.name_en: P❤️B's latest soft structured tote, crafted from grained calfskin. Made in an Italian workshop with suede lining. Features the brand's iconic B-shaped closure, smooth calfskin panels with embossed equestrian knight logo (EKD). Includes a detachable shoulder strap for easy switching between tote and shoulder bag styles. Embossed equestrian knight logo (EKD) on the back. Dimensions 30 x 13 x 24cm.
items.name_cn: P❤️B's latest soft structured tote, crafted from grained calfskin. Made in an Italian workshop with suede lining. Features the brand's iconic B-shaped closure, smooth calfskin panels with embossed equestrian knight logo (EKD). Includes a detachable shoulder strap for easy switching between tote and shoulder bag styles. Embossed equestrian knight logo (EKD) on the back. Dimensions 30 x 13 x 24cm.

items.name_cn:
P👏Premium Original👏New Bea Small Tote
Soft leather, fine and wear-resistant texture, classic metal logo is highly recognizable. Minimalist and elegant design, suitable for both hand-carry and shoulder carry, works for both commuting and casual wear. Moderate capacity, easily holds daily essentials, practical and stylish! The Bea series focuses on a relaxed vibe, easy to handle in both work and life, one of Y's popular models😎
Model: 872469
Size: 18x15x13cm

items.name_cn:
P🔥 🆕 New Arrival 👏【Exclusive Background】
Elephant Print (Mini Size)
🌈 A new member of the Niki family, the mini is simply too cool 😎. The bag shape is beautiful with no flaws; soft sheepskin creates a retro yet stylish look. Crossbody or underarm styles are both great, suitable for both men and women. Combines fashion and functionality. Comfortable and stylish to wear, with ample capacity for daily outings 👍
Model: 828736
Size: 18×12.5×5cm

items.name_en: P🔥 🆕 New Arrival 👏【Exclusive Background】New Large Elephant Print NIKai Front Flap Bag, accented with metal LE CASSANDRE, featuring convertible leather and chain shoulder strap. The popular NIKI Elephant Print is a favorite among many stars and influencers, often sold out at department stores. The globally popular NIKI features a large capacity and elephant print calfskin! The craftsmanship is very complex, offering you a unique visual effect! An absolute must-have style! 👑
